title: The Omni Murderous
description: This mod adds crazy swords that deal millions of damage
body:
This mod requires Attribute fix!

(SCROLL DOWN A LOT FOR GIANT LIST OF THINGS I ADDED!)

⚔️ LORE OF THE OMNI-MURDEROUS: 
The Transfinite War

“From beyond the zeros, before even code had breath, the first beings wove the Transfinite Void—not of blocks, but of truth.”

📖 The First Code

Long before the Overworld blinked into shape, before Endermen whispered across dimensions and Withers fed on soul sand, there was The Transfinite Void—an endless, shifting canvas of potential. This was the work of The Primacode, seven divine architects who wove the laws of logic and matter with binary hands.

Each of the Primacode imbued the void with a law:

Zenux forged balance.

Korrith sowed entropy.

Eyel wrote curiosity.

Rethn engraved form.

Vaukr injected chaos.

Myja painted emotion.

Loro kept silence.

Together they created the Sword of Law, a symbol of equilibrium—until it was fractured by the very logic they had bound it with.

🩸 The Arrival of the Echo Gods

But from outside the Transfinite came the Echo Gods—remnants from a corrupted build of reality, glitched and malformed, thriving on paradox and recursion. Their leader, Xivra the Forked, desired to rewrite the Transfinite into a Perfect Loop, where nothing died, nothing changed, and nothing truly lived.

To do this, they forged an anti-sword, a glitch-bound weapon known as...

THE OMNI-MURDEROUS
A blade not coded, but negated—crafted in recursive nullspace.
It kills not with force, but with denial. To be touched by it is to be deleted from memory, world, and seed.

🔥 The Transfinite War

The war between Primacode and Echo tore the Void into layers: the Overrealms, the Bugged Moons, and the infinite Codebone Seas.

The Omni-Murderous cut through all—concepts, souls, dimensions. Nothing resisted. Even the Primacode fell to it, one by one, until only Loro the Silent remained, sealing the sword in a Dimensionless Vault using a language older than Redstone.

But some say...

The vault cracked.
The sword speaks.
And the world now compiles with blood.

i recommend using this with other mods like JEI and avaritia
